name: bear-notes-chorus
description: Bear Notes MCP with read-after-write verification. Fork with verified writes, tag preservation, and upsert support.
long_description: Chorus fork of the Bear Notes MCP. Adds read-after-write verification to catch silent failures, tag preservation on body replace, H1 section splice fix, bear-upsert-note, and bear-trash-note. Based on vasylenko/claude-desktop-extension-bear-notes (MIT).

enable_chorus_conventions.title: Chorus Conventions
enable_chorus_conventions.description: Enforce Chorus note structure (YAML frontmatter, H1 title, tag mirroring) on create and upsert operations. Validates structure on replace.

enable_content_replacement.title: Content Replacement
enable_content_replacement.description: Allow replacing note content or specific sections using the bear-replace-text tool

tools.name: bear-open-note
tools.description: Read the full text content of a Bear note including OCR'd text from attached images and PDFs

tools.name: bear-create-note
tools.description: Create a new note in your Bear library with optional title, content, and tags

tools.name: bear-search-notes
tools.description: Find notes by searching text content, filtering by tags, or date ranges. Includes OCR search in attachments

tools.name: bear-add-text
tools.description: Insert text at the beginning or end of a Bear note, or within a specific section identified by its header

tools.name: bear-replace-text
tools.description: Replace content in an existing Bear note — either the full body or a specific section. Requires content replacement to be enabled in settings.

tools.name: bear-add-file
tools.description: Attach a file (image, PDF, Excel, etc.) to an existing Bear note using base64-encoded content

tools.name: bear-list-tags
tools.description: List all tags in your Bear library as a hierarchical tree with note counts

tools.name: bear-find-untagged-notes
tools.description: Find notes in your Bear library that have no tags assigned

tools.name: bear-add-tag
tools.description: Add one or more tags to an existing Bear note

tools.name: bear-archive-note
tools.description: Archive a Bear note to remove it from active lists without deleting it

tools.name: bear-rename-tag
tools.description: Rename a tag across all notes in your Bear library

tools.name: bear-delete-tag
tools.description: Delete a tag from all notes in your Bear library without affecting the notes

tools.name: bear-upsert-note
tools.description: Create a new note or replace an existing one entirely, with tag preservation and verified write-back

tools.name: bear-trash-note
tools.description: Move a note to Bear's trash with database verification that the trash operation succeeded

tools.name: bear-get-tags
tools.description: Get the tags assigned to a Bear note without reading the full content
